tools.name: article.getArticleArticleId
tools.description: Returns the article related information such as *Title, Subtitle, Tags,  Topics* (assigned by Medium), *Publication, Published date and time,  Clap Count, Voter Count, Word Count, Reading Time, Language, etc…*

tools.name: article.getArticleArticleIdContent
tools.description: Returns the content of an article/story, for the corresponding `article_id`

tools.name: article.getArticleArticleIdFans
tools.description: Returns a list of `user_ids` of the people who clapped on the article (a.k.a `voters`).

tools.name: article.getArticleArticleIdMarkdown
tools.description: Returns the markdown of an article/story from Medium, for the corresponding `article_id`

tools.name: article.getArticleArticleIdRelated
tools.description:
Returns a list of `article_ids` of the related posts. (Length = 5)

**Note:** If the given article is self-published, related posts will belong to the same author,  else related posts will belong to the publication in which the article is published.

tools.name: article.getArticleArticleIdResponses
tools.description:
Returns a list of responses (`response_ids`, same as `article_ids`) for a given article (`article_id`)
Note: To see the content of the response, use the "Get Article's Content" endpoint

tools.name: list.getListListId
tools.description: Returns the list-related information such as *id, name, author, description,  thumbnail image url, creation datetime, last article inserted datetime,  number of articles in the list, claps, voters, and comments/responses*.

tools.name: list.getListListIdArticles
tools.description: Returns an array of `articles_ids` present in the given Medium List.

tools.name: list.getListListIdResponses
tools.description: Returns an array of `response_ids` of the comments (same as `article_ids`) on the given Medium List.

tools.name: misc.getLatestpostsTopicSlug
tools.description:
Returns a list of latest posts (`article_ids`) for a topic/niche (as classified by the Medium platform). Example of a topic/niche can be:
* blockchain
* relationships
* mental-health, etc …

These are known as `topic_slugs`. At any given moment, this endpoint will return a list of 25 articles (`article_ids`).

tools.name: misc.getRelatedTagsTag
tools.description: Returns a list of `related_tags` for the given `tag`.

tools.name: misc.getTopfeedsTagMode
tools.description: Returns a list of `article_ids` (length: 25) for the given `tag` and `mode`.

tools.name: misc.getTopWriterTopicSlug
tools.description:
Returns a list of top writers (`user_ids`) within a particular topic/niche (`topic_slug`). 
e.g. 
- blockchain
- relationships
- artificial-intelligence, etc ...

**Note:** You can use optional `count` query parameter to limit the number of results.  The maximum number of top writers within a topic/niche will be 250.

tools.name: publication.getPublicationIdForPublicationSlug
tools.description:
Returns the unique `publication_id` for the given `publication_slug`.

**Note:** You can find the `publication_slug` from the publication's homepage URL.
- medium.com/**publication_slug**

tools.name: publication.getPublicationPublicationId
tools.description:
Returns the publication related information such as *Publication name, Tagline, Description, Tags, Followers Count, Twitter username, Instagram username, Facebook Page name, etc …*

**Note:** If you don't know the `publication_id`, you can get it from any article published by it. Use endpoint "/article/{article_id}" to retrieve the `publication_id`.

tools.name: publication.getPublicationPublicationIdArticles
tools.description: Returns the list of `articles_ids`, of the latest 25 articles, posted in that publication.

tools.name: publication.getPublicationPublicationIdNewsletter
tools.description:
Returns the newsletter related information such as *id, name, description, slug, creator_id, subscribers, image_url, etc …*

**Note:** If you don't know the `publication_id`, you can get it from any article published by it. Use endpoint "/article/{article_id}" to retrieve the `publication_id`.

tools.name: search.getSearchArticlesQueryQuery
tools.description: Returns the list of `articles_ids` for the given search query results. (Max Length = 1000)

tools.name: search.getSearchListsQueryQuery
tools.description: Returns an array of `list_ids` for the given search query results. (Max Length = 1000)

tools.name: search.getSearchPublicationsQueryQuery
tools.description: Returns the list of `publication_ids` for the given search query results. (Max Length = 1000)

tools.name: search.getSearchTagsQueryQuery
tools.description: Returns a list of `tags` for the given search query results. (Max Length = 1000)

tools.name: search.getSearchUsersQueryQuery
tools.description: Returns a list of `user_ids` for the given search query results. (Max Length = 1000)

tools.name: user.getUserIdForUsername
tools.description:
Returns the unique `user_id` for the given `username`.

**Note:** You can find the `username` from the user's/author's profile page URL. 
- **username**.medium.com
- medium.com/@**username**

tools.name: user.getUserUserId
tools.description:
Returns user related information like *Full name, Bio, Followers count, Following count, Twitter username, Profile-image URL, User ID, etc...* 

It takes `user_id` as the path parameter.

**Note:** If you don't know the `user_id`, then you can get it from the endpoint\
'/user/id_for/{`username`}'.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdArticles
tools.description: Returns the list of articles (`article_ids`) written by the user.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdFollowers
tools.description:
Returns the list of `user_ids` of the user's followers.

**Note:** The length of this followers' list might be different from what you get in  the "Get User Info" Endpoint. It's because, this list doesn't include Medium Users who  left the platform.
If you really need the exact followers' count, use this endpoint to get the followers'  list and take its length as the exact followers' count

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdFollowing
tools.description:
Returns the list of `user_ids` of the user's followings.

**Note:** Currently, this list does not contain the `publication_ids` of the publications that the user is following.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdInterests
tools.description: Returns a list of tags that the given user follows.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdLists
tools.description:
Returns an array of `list_ids` created by the user.

**Note:** You can check whether the use has created lists or not beforehand. Check the  `has_list` attribute in the "Article Info" endpoint.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdPublications
tools.description: Returns a list of `publication_ids` where the user is the editor and/or creator.

tools.name: user.getUserUserIdTopArticles
tools.description: Returns a list of `article_ids` of the top 10 articles on the user's profile, for a given `user_id`.

tools.name: welcome.get
tools.description:
**Test Endpoint**
Returns the information about the Medium API

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
